title: Overworld height increase
description: Increase height to 2032 blocks in overworld
body:
Small datapack that increases the height of the overworld to 2032 blocks (stil keeping the -64 to 0 heights)

Will not be loaded into the world with just /reload, you would need to rejoin a world with the datapack to apply changes. 

## Make backups of your world before installing this datapack! Worldgen changes may break your world.
